allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 ; Write-Output "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" ; Write-Output "Title: $\(\($r.Content | Select-String -Pattern '<title>\([^<]+\)' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }\) -join '' \)")

PowerShell($pages = @\("http://localhost:3000", "http://localhost:3000/ads", "http://localhost:3000/personal", "http://localhost:3000/admin", "http://localhost:3000/api/content"\) ; foreach \($url in $pages\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20; Write-Output "$\($r.StatusCode\) $url" } catch { Write-Output "ERROR $url : $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/content" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 ; $json = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json ; Write-Output "Site name: $\($json.site.name\)" ; Write-Output "Bezalel projects: $\($json.bezalel.projects.Count\)" ; Write-Output "Ads groups: $\($json.ads.groups.Count\)")
